pi_items.source: Verified via web search of Grants.gov; multiple actual grant opportunities are available for rural health keyword including Rural Health Transformation Program, Rural Health Care Services Outreach Program, Rural Health Network Advancement Program, and others
Verified in task.json description (line 5), export_result.sh (line 41), and verifier.py (line 41). Task explicitly requires: 'Create a Firefox bookmark folder named Grant Prospects'
Verified in export_result.sh (line 60) and verifier.py (line 35). Path is consistent across all task files
Verified in task.json description: 'Select 3 distinct opportunities from the results'. Verifier.py checks for >= 3 valid bookmarks (line 78) and >= 3 data entries (line 131)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real data from Grants.gov, the official U.S. federal grants database. The keyword 'rural health' returns authentic funding opportunities available to 501(c)(3) nonprofits, including programs such as the Rural Health Transformation Program, Rural Health Care Services Outreach Program, and Rural Health Network Advancement Program. The JSON output file structure uses verified field names available from Grants.gov: opportunity_number, title, agency, posted_date, and close_date. The bookmark folder 'Grant Prospects' and output file path '/home/ga/Documents/grant_prospects.json' are correctly specified.
